member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.Elasticsearch.ProductIndex.PriceType
member.summary: 采购价格形式 1 矩阵 2 全型号 3 简易型号 4 简易型号+矩阵

member.summary: Desc:3d模型文件夹名称 Default: Nullable:True

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.Elasticsearch.ProductIndex.CatalogUrl
member.summary: Desc:商品目录图片路径 Default: Nullable:True

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.Elasticsearch.ProductIndex.ProductDetailPicUrl
member.summary: Desc:商品详情图片路径 Default: Nullable:True

member.summary: 是否已经全部生成型号

member.summary: Desc:官网3d文件地址 Default: Nullable:False

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.Elasticsearch.ProductIndex.Official2DUrl
member.summary: Desc:官网2d文件地址 Default: Nullable:False

member.summary: 参数值类型 S:枚举字符型 N:枚举数值型 R:枚举区间型 F:公式型 FB 纯公式型

member.summary: 参数展示类型 H:横向单行字符列表 M:横向混合字符列表 N:横向单行数值列表 R:横向单行数值区间 X:不显示

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductParameter.ParamValues
member.summary: 参数可选项列表或区间数据

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductParameter.IsSpecOption
member.summary: 选中值是否特殊选项 默认false 不是; true 是

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductParameter.SpecialValues
member.summary: 特殊选项值集合，包含计算值，比较值

member.summary: 对应与产品选型的比较值

member.summary: Desc:参数选项顺序 Default: Nullable:True

member.summary: 是否包含（参数值包含选择的值）

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductQueryParam.SelectData
member.summary: 参数值 兼容旧选型,有些存储的是ID,有些存储的是value

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductQueryParam.IsSpecOption
member.summary: 是否特殊选项 默认false 不是; true 是

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductSalesPriceDiscount.DiscountId
member.summary: Desc:商品销售折扣KEY Default: Nullable:False

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductSelectionRequest.IsAllRemove
member.summary: 选择的值是否全部移除

member.name: P:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductSizeChartParameter.Value
member.summary: 产品参数编码 或者产品参数值编码

member.name: T:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.SelectionRegex
member.summary: 产品选型 正则表达式 验证 https://regex101.com/

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.SelectionRegex.ProductNumber
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[0-9a-zA-Z_.*\\\\/-]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [*--9A-Z\\_a-z] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.SelectionRegex.RuleConnector
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[- _*\\/+]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [ *+-/_] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.SelectionRegex.RuleParameter
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[0-9a-zA-Z<>|]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [0-9<>A-Za-z|] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.SelectionRegex.FixedParameter
member.remarks:
Pattern:
<[0-9a-zA-Z]+>
Explanation:
○ Match '<'.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Za-z] atomically at least once.
○ Match '>'.

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.SelectionRegex.JoinParameter
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\[.*?\\]
Explanation:
○ Match '['.
○ Match a character other than '\n' lazily any number of times.
○ Match ']'.

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.Service.AbstractProductSelection.IsInterval(mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductParameter)
member.summary: 判断是否区间，公式参数最终也是要计算出区间。这里也当区间，

member.name: M:mymooo.product.selection.Service.AbstractProductSelection.FormulaCal(mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.DisplayProductModelData,mymooo.product.selection.SelectionModel.ProductModel,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.param: 已经计算过的参数编码集合
记录在这个参数之前所有参数选择的值集合
编码集合中遍历的编码索引
最后一个选择的参数集合

member.summary: 根据计算的结果，框定参数值的选定范围

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ProductNumber_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.

member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.

member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLettersAndDigits
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_1AC00000000008000000000
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in " *+-/_".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_E4FF03FEFFFF97FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "*-./0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ\\_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_FF53FEFFFF07FEFFFF17
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789<>ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz|".
